creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Zetro Track from comment #8)
Currently dogfooding 4.8. Unfortunately, the bugs are piling up a bit:

- cinnamon-screensaver still needs (reconciliation) work with our OpenPAM (they assume/expect Linux-PAM)
- nemo{,-desktop} no longer runs, crashes on startup

I've been extremely short on time for anything major (ie other than version bumping the port Makefiles), but things should open up for the next few weeks.

Additionally, because the delta between the gnome@ devel repo and the vanilla ports tree has gotten so big, combined with my lack of commit access there, I've had to stop updating the associated pull request. My work has always pretty much lived in a separate mercurial repo (based from hg-beta)
